setup.incomplete_toast: Please complete your organization setup to unlock all features.
setup.mandatory_subtitle: Complete your profile and upload documents to unlock all features.
setup.staff_mandatory_subtitle: Organization setup is in progress. Please contact your administrator to complete the setup.
setup.checklist_subtitle: Please complete the following blocks to unlock all features.

payments.subtitle: Analyze your spending and track transaction history.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your appointments.

common.name: Name
common.chat_hint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line
common.select_conversation_desc: Choose a user from the left panel to start messaging or reply to their queries in real-time.
common.search_typo_hint: Try checking for typos or using different keywords.

resource_mgmt.mgmt_tooltip: Resources are doctors, staff, rooms, or equipment. Create them here and link them to multiple services with specific fees.
resource_mgmt.mgmt_subtitle: Manage independent resources and their service-specific pricing.
resource_mgmt.services_fees_hint: Select services and set specific fees for this resource.
resource_mgmt.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this resource?

other.title: Other Business
other.desc: A flexible queue for any business.

clinic.title: Welcome to your Healthcare Hub!
clinic.description: Your clinic is set up for scheduled appointments with specific doctors.
clinic.step1: Manage your Doctors in the "Resources" section.
clinic.step2: Check "Slots" to define working hours for each doctor.
clinic.step3: Share your link with patients to start taking bookings.

bank.title: Welcome to your Central Queue!
bank.description: Your bank is set up for a general first-come-first-served walk-in system.
bank.step1: Add different Service Counters in the "Resources" section.
bank.step2: Use "Live Queue" to call customers to specific counters.
bank.step3: Download the QR code for your customers to join the line.

salon.title: Welcome to your Salon!
salon.description: Your salon is set up for bookings with specific stylists.
salon.step1: Add your Stylists in the "Resources" section.
salon.step2: Go to "Slots" to set their availability.
salon.step3: Share your booking page on social media.

service_center.title: Welcome to your Service Center!
service_center.description: Your center is set up for walk-in repair or pickup queues.
service_center.step3: Start serving customers using the "Live Queue" tab.

other.title: Welcome to Queuify!
other.description: Your business is ready to manage queues effectively.
other.step1: Review your "Services" to customize your offerings.
other.step2: Check "Resources" to add your staff or counters.
other.step3: Use "Live Queue" to manage real-time customer flow.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to continue to Queuify
auth.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?

appointment.no_upcoming_hint: You don't have any upcoming appointments. Browse organizations to book one!
appointment.no_history_hint: No completed appointments yet. Your history will appear here.
appointment.no_cancelled_hint: No cancelled appointments. That's a good thing!
appointment.people_ahead_tooltip: Number of confirmed bookings currently ahead of you in this specific slot.
appointment.wait_time_tooltip: Estimated time until your turn, based on real-time resource performance.
appointment.token_tooltip: Your unique sequence number for this slot. Use this for tracking your position.
appointment.clear_schedule: Looks like your schedule is clear.

services.title: Service Management

services.delete_confirm: Delete this service and all its resources?
services.create_first: Create your first service to get started.
services.add_resource_hint: Add a resource to start creating time slots.
services.no_resources_hint: No resources for this service. Add resources first.
services.price_help: Set a fee for this service. Users will be asked to pay this amount during booking.
services.queue_scope_help: CENTRAL: One shared queue for all resources. PER_RESOURCE: Separate queue for each staff/doctor (best for specific bookings).
services.estimated_duration_help: Average time per appointment. This is used for wait-time estimates and as a default timing for new slots.

slots.subtitle: Manage time slots for your resources.

slots.delete_confirm: Delete this slot? Existing appointments may be affected.

slots.mgmt_tooltip: Slots are the specific time periods when a Resource is available for a Service. Select a Service and then a Resource to create a slot.
slots.mgmt_subtitle: Create and manage time slots for your resources.

danger.subtitle: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone.

qr.missing_link_desc: Your organization doesn't have a unique public link yet. This is required to generate a QR code.

qr.scan_desc: Scan this QR to book an appointment
qr.step1_desc: Download and print this QR code to display at your reception or entrance.
qr.step2_desc: Customers scan the code using their phone camera.
qr.step3_desc: They will be instantly redirected to your booking page. New users will be prompted to join Queuify first.

tooltip.peak_hours_heatmap: Visual distribution of bookings across days and hours. Darker areas indicate higher demand, helping you optimize staffing.
tooltip.efficiency_score: Score based on average service time vs. service norm.
tooltip.total_bookings: Total number of appointments scheduled within the selected time range.
tooltip.slot_utilization: Percentage of available time slots that have been filled by bookings.
tooltip.cancellation_rate: Percentage of total bookings that were cancelled during this period.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.sec1_desc: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, update your profile, use our services, or communicate with us. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to provide.
privacy.sec2_desc: We use the information we collect to operate, maintain, and improve our services, communicate with you, process your transactions, and provide customer support.
privacy.sec3_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect the security of your personal information. However, please note that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure.
privacy.sec4_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@Queuify.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.sec1_desc: By accessing or using Queuify, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
terms.sec2_desc: Permission is granted to temporarily use the Queuify platform for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title.
terms.sec3_desc: The materials on Queuify are provided on an 'as is' basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaim and negate all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.
terms.sec4_desc: In no event shall Queuify or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Queuify.
terms.sec5_desc: Queuify uses a secure escrow system for paid bookings. Funds are held by Queuify and only released to the Organization's wallet after the service is marked as 'Completed' via OTP verification or check-in. In non-production environments, mock payments may be used.
terms.sec6_desc: Full refunds are issued if an organization cancels your appointment. For user cancellations, 100% refund is provided if cancelled at least 3 hours before start time. Cancellations within 3 hours are eligible for an 85% refund. No refunds are provided for 'No Show' statuses.
terms.sec7_desc: Organizations can withdraw their Available Balance to verified bank accounts or UPI IDs. Payout requests are typically processed within 1-3 business days. Organizations must maintain accurate KYC and banking details to receive funds.
terms.sec8_desc: Users are responsible for providing the correct OTP to the organization at the time of service to trigger the release of escrowed funds. Failure to do so may result in the appointment status remaining 'confirmed' but being marked as 'no show' if not completed.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.sec1_desc: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to the owners of the site.
cookie.sec2_desc: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. Essential cookies are required for basic site functionality, while analytical cookies help us understand how you use our platform.

sec3_list.essential: Necessary for the website to function properly.
sec3_list.analytical: Allow us to recognize and count the number of visitors and see how visitors move around our website.
sec3_list.functionality: Used to recognize you when you return to our website.

cookie.sec4_desc: Most web browsers allow some control of most cookies through the browser settings. To find out more about cookies, including how to see what cookies have been set, visit www.aboutcookies.org or www.allaboutcookies.org.

payment.refund_policy: Refund Policy: Full refund if cancelled 3+ hours before. 85% refund if cancelled within 3 hours.

bulk_copy.resource_hint: Leave blank to copy all resources.
bulk_copy.overwrite_desc: Existing slots on target dates will be deactivated before copying.
bulk_copy.min_date_error: Target date must be in the future.
